headline: Scale Computing™ Enables Organizations to Replace VMware® on Dell VxRail™ Appliances to Reuse Existing Hardware as Memory and Server Prices Surge
summary: Scale Computing™, the leader in edge computing and network solutions, today announced new capabilities and guidance that enable organizations to replace VMware® on Dell VxRail™ systems using Scale Computing HyperCore™ virtualization suite, helping them reuse existing hardware and control infrastructure spending at a time when memory, storage, and server prices are rising sharply.

headline: Forget Nvidia: Why HPE Could Be the Overlooked AI Infrastructure Play of 2026
summary: Nvidia (NYSE: NVDA) dominates the chip layer of the artificial intelligence (AI) buildout with spectacular results. But the infrastructure layer matters: every GPU Nvidia ships comes inside a server chassis, connected by networking fabric, deployed in enterprise data centers. The companies building that infrastructure layer ride the same AI wave at a fraction of the ... Forget Nvidia: Why HPE Could Be the Overlooked AI Infrastructure Play of 2026
